<html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <link href="https://fonts.cdnfonts.com/css/star-crush" rel="stylesheet">
  <title>Psalms for Speedway Boulevard</title>
  <style>
    * {
      cursor: url('data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAABQAAAAUCAYAAACNiR0NAAAAWUlEQVR4nM3QQQ6AIAxE0bn/pYeQKFG0EOhf8Pd9aStJFpxp1DUS9R2F+hmBui+LfsAs+gtm0BDcRYfgDjoFV9EQQDa8hpkfBvhyKCZ1J2ax15YU1lASO7cCZ5VDy1WPbfwAAAAASUVORK5CYII=') 0 0, default !important;
    }
    a, button {
      cursor: url('data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAABQAAAAUCAYAAACNiR0NAAAAWUlEQVR4nM3QQQ6AIAxE0bn/pYeQKFG0EOhf8Pd9aStJFpxp1DUS9R2F+hmBui+LfsAs+gtm0BDcRYfgDjoFV9EQQDa8hpkfBvhyKCZ1J2ax15YU1lASO7cCZ5VDy1WPbfwAAAAASUVORK5CYII=') 0 0, pointer !important;
    }
 
    body {
      background-color: white;
      font-family: "Times New Roman", Times, serif;
      text-align: center;
      margin: 0;
      padding: 0 0 20px 0;
    }
 
    a { color: blue; }
    a:visited { color: purple; }
 
    #window {
      width: 700px;
      margin: 18px auto 18px auto;
      background: white;
      border: 2px solid;
      border-color: #DFDFDF #808080 #808080 #DFDFDF;
      box-shadow: 3px 3px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
    }
    #window-body {
      padding: 14px 20px 20px 20px;
    }
 
    #header h1 {
      font-size: 42px;
      margin: 10px 0 4px 0;
      letter-spacing: 4px;
      font-family: "Times New Roman", Times, serif;
      font-weight: 900;
      font-style: normal;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: black;
      image-rendering: pixelated;
    }
    #header h2 {
      font-size: 18px;
      margin: 0 0 8px 0;
      font-weight: normal;
    }
 
    .blink {
      animation: blinker 1s step-start infinite;
    }
    @keyframes blinker { 50% { opacity: 0; } }
 
    .xp-hr {
      border: none;
      border-top: 1px solid #808080;
      border-bottom: 1px solid #FFFFFF;
      margin: 14px 0;
    }
 
    .section {
      text-align: left;
      margin: 14px 0;
    }
 
    #episodes {
      text-align: center;
    }
 
    .section h2 {
      color: black;
      font-size: 18px;
      font-family: "Times New Roman", Times, serif;
      font-weight: bold;
      padding: 0;
      margin: 0 0 8px 0;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 1px;
    }
 
    .section p, .section ul {
      font-size: 14px;
      line-height: 1.7;
      margin: 6px 0;
    }
    .section ul { padding-left: 22px; }
 
    .xp-box {
      border: 2px solid;
      border-color: #808080 #FFFFFF #FFFFFF #808080;
      outline: 1px solid #404040;
      padding: 8px 12px;
      margin-bottom: 10px;
      background: #F5F4EA;
      font-size: 14px;
    }
 
    .episode {
      border: 2px solid;
      border-color: #DFDFDF #808080 #808080 #DFDFDF;
      padding: 8px 12px;
      margin-bottom: 8px;
      background: none;
      text-align: center;
    }
    .episode h3 {
      margin: 0 0 3px 0;
      font-size: 15px;
    }
    .episode p {
      margin: 0;
      font-size: 13px;
      color: #333;
    }
 
    #guestbook-entries {
      max-height: 220px;
      overflow-y: auto;
      border: 2px solid;
      border-color: #808080 #DFDFDF #DFDFDF #808080;
      padding: 8px;
      margin-bottom: 10px;
      background: white;
      font-size: 13px;
    }
    .gb-entry {
      border-bottom: 1px dashed #ccc;
      padding: 5px 0;
    }
    .gb-entry .gb-name { font-weight: bold; color: #0A246A; }
    .gb-entry .gb-date { font-size: 11px; color: #666; float: right; }
 
    #guestbook-form label {
      display: block;
      margin-top: 8px;
      font-size: 13px;
      font-weight: bold;
    }
    #guestbook-form input,
    #guestbook-form textarea {
      font-family: "Times New Roman", Times, serif;
      font-size: 13px;
      width: 100%;
      padding: 3px 4px;
      border: 2px solid;
      border-color: #808080 #DFDFDF #DFDFDF #808080;
      background: white;
      box-sizing: border-box;
    }
    #guestbook-form input:focus,
    #guestbook-form textarea:focus {
      outline: 1px dotted #0A246A;
    }
 
    .xp-btn {
      margin-top: 8px;
      font-family: "Times New Roman", Times, serif;
      font-size: 13px;
      padding: 4px 18px;
      border: 2px solid;
      border-color: #FFFFFF #808080 #808080 #FFFFFF;
      outline: 1px solid #000;
      background: #ECE9D8;
      color: black;
    }
    .xp-btn:hover { background: #D4D0C8; }
    .xp-btn:active { border-color: #808080 #FFFFFF #FFFFFF #808080; }
 
    #footer {
      font-size: 11px;
      color: #555;
      padding: 16px 0 8px 0;
      border-top: 1px solid #808080;
      margin-top: 16px;
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
 
  <div id="window">
    <div id="window-body">
 
      <!-- HEADER -->
      <div id="header">
        <h1>Psalms for Speedway Boulevard</h1>
        <h2>A <span class="blink">music</span> show based somewhere between Tucson and Essex.</h2>
        <div><img src="data:image/gif;base64," width="32" height="32" alt="heart"><img src="data:image/gif;base64," width="24" height="32" alt="note"><img src="data:image/gif;base64," width="30" height="30" alt="star"><img src="data:image/gif;base64," width="24" height="32" alt="note"><img src="data:image/gif;base64," width="32" height="32" alt="heart"></div>
      </div>
 
      <div class="xp-hr"></div>
 
      <!-- EPISODES -->
      <div class="section" id="episodes">
        <h2>&#9654; Episodes</h2>
        <p style="font-size:13px;"><em></em></p>
      <div class="section" id="episode-space">
      </div>

        <div class="episode">
          <h3>&#9654; <a href="#">Episode 10 — "Placeholder Title"</a></h3>
          <p>Personal favourites episode. Music from Carpenters, Arthur Russell, and Floating Points. Special guests Mum + Dad, Nico Deshler, and some other Essex people.</p>
        </div><div class="episode">
          <h3>&#9654; <a href="#">Episode 09 — "Placeholder Title"</a></h3>
          <p>Music from WITCH, Beruit, and Phillip Glass. Special guests Val Riveira-Lies and Mark Evans.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="episode">
          <h3>&#9654; <a href="#">Episode 08 — "Placeholder Title"</a></h3>
          <p>Music from Wings, Albert Ayler, and Colleen. Special guests Lola Wicks and Bea Troxel.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="episode">
          <h3>&#9654; <a href="#">Episode 07 — "Placeholder Title"</a></h3>
          <p>Music from Talking Heads, Sinead O'Connor, and The Smile. Special guests Hannah Lawless and Max Mayo-Dell.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="episode">
          <h3>&#9654; <a href="#">Episode 06 — "Placeholder Title"</a></h3>
          <p>Music from Archie Shepp, Julianna Barwick, and Squarepusher. Special guests Justin Risley and Gabriel Dozal.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="episode">
          <h3>&#9654; <a href="#">Episode 05 — "Placeholder Title"</a></h3>
          <p>Music from Racing Mount Pleasant, Scott Walker, and The Cure. Special guests Mike Powell and Marina Gurmendi.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="episode">
          <h3>&#9654; <a href="#">Episode 04 — "Placeholder Title"</a></h3>
          <p>Special lovesong edition. Music from Leonard Cohen, Oneohtrix Point Never, and Joni Mitchell. Special guests Manuel Munoz and Ingrid Wenzler.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="episode">
          <h3>&#9654; <a href="#">Episode 03 — "Placeholder Title"</a></h3>
          <p>Music from This is Lorelei, Le Volume Courbe, and Pharoah Sanders. Special guests Karina Marcano and Andrew Graziano.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="episode">
          <h3>&#9654; <a href="#">Episode 02 — "Placeholder Title"</a></h3>
          <p>Music from Nina Simone, Sparklehorse, and Joan As Policewoman. Special guests Issy Bunn and Jeff Evans.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="episode">
          <h3>&#9654; <a href="#">Episode 01 — "Placeholder Title"</a></h3>
          <p>Music from The Fall, Miles Davis, and Geese. Special guests Greg Nero and Mitch Mackowiak.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
 
      <div class="xp-hr"></div>
 
      <!-- GUESTBOOK -->
      <div class="section" id="guestbook">
        <h2>&#128211; Guestbook</h2>
        <p style="font-size:13px;">Sign our guestbook and let us know you stopped by. No poop talk please.</p>
 
        <div id="guestbook-entries">
          <div class="gb-entry">
            <span class="gb-name">MusicFan99</span>
            <span class="gb-date">03/14/2004</span><br>
            Episode 06 is incredible!!! I've listened like five times already.
          </div>
          <div class="gb-entry">
            <span class="gb-name">RadioListener_TX</span>
            <span class="gb-date">03/10/2004</span><br>
            Found this through a friend. Just wanted to say hi!! Great tunes.
          </div>
          <div class="gb-entry">
            <span class="gb-name">xXmusicloverXx</span>
            <span class="gb-date">03/07/2004</span><br>
            DJ Placeholder is the best!! Keep the episodes coming :)
          </div>
        </div>
 
        <div id="guestbook-form">
          <label for="gb-name-input">Your Name:</label>
          <input type="text" id="gb-name-input" placeholder="e.g. RadioFan2004" maxlength="40">
          <label for="gb-message-input">Your Message:</label>
          <textarea id="gb-message-input" rows="3" placeholder="Leave a message..."></textarea>
          <button class="xp-btn" onclick="submitGuestbook()">Sign Guestbook &#9997;</button>
        </div>
      </div>
 
      <div class="xp-hr"></div>
 
      <!-- CONTACT -->
      <div class="section" id="contact">
        <h2>&#128140; Contact</h2>
        <div class="xp-box">
          <p>Got a track recommendation? A question? Just want to say hi? We love hearing from listeners.</p>
          <p>&#128140; Email us: <a href="mailto:jojotucsonarizona@gmail.com">jojotucsonarizona@gmail.com</a></p>
        </div>
      </div>
 
      <!-- FOOTER -->
      <div id="footer">
        <p>
          &copy; 2026 Psalms for Speedway Boulevard. All rights reserved.<br>
        </p>
        <p><small>You are visitor #<span id="visit-count">004821</span></small></p>
      </div>
 
    </div>
  </div>
 
  <svg width="0" height="0" style="position:absolute;">
    <defs>
      <filter id="pixelate" x="0" y="0">
        <feFlood x="4" y="4" height="2" width="2"/>
        <feComposite width="8" height="8"/>
        <feTile result="a"/>
        <feComposite in="SourceGraphic" in2="a" operator="in"/>
        <feMorphology operator="dilate" radius="3"/>
      </filter>
    </defs>
  </svg>
 
  <script>
    function submitGuestbook() {
      const nameInput = document.getElementById("gb-name-input");
      const messageInput = document.getElementById("gb-message-input");
      const name = nameInput.value.trim();
      const message = messageInput.value.trim();
      if (!name || !message) { alert("Please fill in both your name and a message!"); return; }
      const entries = document.getElementById("guestbook-entries");
      const today = new Date();
      const dateStr = (today.getMonth()+1).toString().padStart(2,"0") + "/" +
                      today.getDate().toString().padStart(2,"0") + "/" +
                      today.getFullYear();
      const newEntry = document.createElement("div");
      newEntry.className = "gb-entry";
      newEntry.innerHTML = `<span class="gb-name">${escapeHtml(name)}</span>
        <span class="gb-date">${dateStr}</span><br>${escapeHtml(message)}`;
      entries.insertBefore(newEntry, entries.firstChild);
      nameInput.value = ""; messageInput.value = "";
      alert("Thanks for signing the guestbook, " + name + "!");
    }
 
    function escapeHtml(t) {
      return t.replace(/&/g,"&amp;").replace(/</g,"&lt;").replace(/>/g,"&gt;");
    }
  </script>
 
</body>
</html>
